comments.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Workflow scoped to 'rebar.mirror_guard --replication' on the default GITHUB_TOKEN (contents: read only); invalid 'administration: read' key removed; ruleset-drift check dropped from this workflow. Verified GREEN: workflow_dispatch run 28757132712 succeeded (17s), replication in-sync, no PAT. Operational 'green on main' AC confirmed live but not statically verifiable, so closing uncertified by design.". Session: 26d60938d.

compiled_state.description:
## Summary
The mirror-guard workflow fails on every evaluation: permissions declares 'administration: read', which is NOT a valid GITHUB_TOKEN workflow-permission scope, so the workflow fails schema validation and no jobs run (0-job 'startup failure'). Even if valid, its ruleset-drift check needs a GitHub token with administration:read (a fine-grained PAT), which org policy won't grant the default token.

## Reproduction Steps
1. Push to main (or trigger mirror-guard).
2. Observe: run created with 0 jobs, conclusion=failure, 'log not found'.

## Expected vs Actual
- Expected: mirror-guard runs and verifies Gerrit->GitHub replication using the default token.
- Actual: workflow fails validation (invalid permission key) and never runs.

## Fix
Scope the Actions workflow to the REPLICATION check only (rebar.mirror_guard --replication), which needs no admin token (fetch_github_main_sha treats the token as optional; Gerrit read is anonymous). Drop the ruleset-drift check from this workflow and remove the invalid administration:read permission, so it runs on the default GITHUB_TOKEN (contents: read) with no PAT.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] mirror-guard.yml permissions contains no invalid keys (drops administration:read; keeps contents: read).
- [ ] The workflow runs 'rebar.mirror_guard --replication' (no ruleset check), needing no fine-grained PAT.
- [ ] mirror-guard is green on main (replication in sync) without any new secret.
compiled_state.title: mirror-guard CI red: invalid administration:read permission + PAT-only ruleset check
